chunks.title: Introduction to Lists in Python
chunks.text: In Python programming, list is a very important data type.

chunks.title: Introduction to Lists in Python
chunks.text: If you want to store 10, 15, 20 things in a particular entity,

chunks.title: Introduction to Lists in Python
chunks.text: then you can make a list of it.

chunks.title: Introduction to Lists in Python
chunks.text: For example, you can make a list of marks of students of class 8,

chunks.title: Introduction to Lists in Python
chunks.text: or you can make a list of people living in Europe,

chunks.title: Introduction to Lists in Python
chunks.text: or you can make a list of people enrolled in 100 days of code Python.

chunks.title: Introduction to Lists in Python
chunks.text: By making all these lists, you can perform some operations on them,

chunks.title: Introduction to Lists in Python
chunks.text: you can iterate them, and you can call them by one name.
